name: Build Your Dream Stud
description:
Art by O_reowoof on Twitter.

[Thread: The Artisan’s Forge – Flex Off Thread 💪🔥]

SwoleEnthusiast94:
"Alright, y’all, show off your Bound Ones. Who got the biggest, beefiest, most jaw-dropping stud from the Forge? I’ll start."

Attached Image: OP standing next to a colossal, barrel-chested lion with a golden mane cascading over his mountainous traps. The lion’s arms are crossed, pecs bulging like overfilled airbags, while OP is struggling to press a hand into his abs, grinning like a fool.

"Dude feels like he’s carved out of solid granite. One hug from him and I swear I hear my ribs creak. 12/10 would get crushed again."

HyenaHavoc:
"Bro, y’all think you got size? Look at this unit."

Attached Video: A massive spotted hyena hoisting his owner up in a crushing bearhug, laughing as he effortlessly swings him side to side like a ragdoll. The user, voice strained, manages to wheeze out something about seeing his life flash before his eyes.

"Not gonna lie, I did NOT think he’d take ‘affectionate’ so literally. Dude picks me up every time I enter the room."

StripedMenace:
"Lmao y’all getting overpowered while I’m just living my best life."

Attached Image: A smug, absolutely shredded white tiger lounging on a couch, shirtless, one arm draped over his owner’s shoulders while flexing his other bicep for the camera. His smirk is pure arrogance, his pecs spilling over his torso like boulders.

"Told him to be cocky but playful. Now he constantly challenges me to arm wrestles and ‘accidentally’ rips his clothes just to show off. I have created a monster."

BullishGains:
"Okay but has anyone else's Bound One just decided they run the house? Mine's a bull and he just... takes things."

Attached Video: A black-furred minotaur casually lifting his user off the ground with one arm, setting him down on the couch like he weighs nothing. The camera shakes as OP groans in protest while the minotaur pats his head condescendingly.

"Told him to be dominant but chill. Now he carries me around like I’m a toddler. Help."

GrizzlyGrip:
"Ayo who else got one that doesn't know their own strength?"

Attached Image: A brown bear Bound One with arms like tree trunks, mid-hug, while the user is completely swallowed in his embrace, only a single flailing hand visible.

"Send prayers. I may not survive the next hug."

CanineCrush:
"We doin' flex shots? Say less."

Attached GIF: A hulking Doberman Bound One doing a slow, deliberate most-muscular pose, pecs bouncing in sync. His owner stands beside him, looking absurdly tiny in comparison while trying to mirror the pose and failing spectacularly.

"He’s been teaching me how to lift. I can’t move my arms today."

PumpedPenguin:
"All y’all got these muscle-bound freaks and meanwhile I got this dude."

Attached Image: A surprisingly buff penguin, still compact but built like a tiny boulder, crossing his arms with a serious expression while his owner looks confused beside him.

"He’s only like 5ft but I swear he’s denser than a dying star. Also, he refuses to let me win in Smash Bros."

AlphaPredator69:
"Yo, who else’s Bound One challenges every dude they meet? My wolf won’t let another guy in the house without trying to assert dominance."

Attached Video: A towering, silver-furred wolf in a tank top f
creator: MaleYetMisgendered_?
